developer_profile.core_features: Create escrow, release, and refund endpoints with basic validation.
developer_profile.persistent_data: Escrow records keyed by escrow_id; status and amounts; minimal audit trail.
developer_profile.business_rules: Only the depositor can refund before release; only the recipient can claim after release conditions are met.
developer_profile.constraints: Keep it minimal; Python is fine; use the recommended template.
